char-luna.name: Luna
char-luna.description: Your lovable child. Full of curiosity and endlessly playful, but also sweet, just like her parents.

battle.description: She has a 6.98% chance to Crit. She has a slightly higher INT growth and slightly lower VIT growth than Noel. Skills available by weapon type (needs to be tested):
skills: Cyclone Neko Damashi Fist Ultimate Attack
Power Wave Dash Slash Short Sword Ultimate Attack

char-noel.name: Noel
char-noel.description: Your lovable child. Full of curiosity and endlessly playful, but also sweet, just like his parents.

battle.description: He has a 6.98% chance to Crit. He has a slightly lower INT growth and slightly higher VIT growth than Luna. Inherited skills dependent on parent:

char-amber.name: Amber
char-amber.description: Transformed from a butterfly-shaped monster and now works at Illuminata's flower shop. Loves the warm sun and hates being cold. Her smiles seem to be contagious. Clorica's sleeping buddy.

battle.description: Her attacks have a base Diz of 2, stun for 25% longer and have 2.98% chance to Crit. Her resistances are 14.99% Diz and 9.99% Crit.

char-clorica.name: Clorica
char-clorica.description: A butler working in the castle. Falls asleep a lot. Finishes her work quickly by somehow working in her sleep, and can even cook a gourmet meal while sleeping with ease. Just how on earth can she do all that?

battle.description: She has a 4.98% chance to Crit.
skills: Throw Food (when the protagonist isn't "Full"). If the attack misses, the food can be picked up as a normal item.

char-dolce.name: Dolce
char-dolce.description: A girl with a sharp tongue. Good at sewing and can contact ghosts, much to her annoyance. Often makes sarcastic remarks, mostly in the general direction of a certain obsessive ghost, but is actually sweet and warm-hearted.

battle.description: Her attacks have a 2.98% chance to crit. Her resistances are Diz 14.99% and Crit 4.98%

char-forte.name: Forte
char-forte.description: A female knight guarding the town. Inherited her father's title after his death. Stubborn, easily flustered when the subject of sweets comes up, but dependable, and often spoils her younger brother, Kiel.

battle.description: Her attacks stun for 25% longer and have a 4.98% chance to Crit. Her resistances are 9.99% to Diz and 25% to Crit.

char-xiao-pai.name: Xiao Pai
char-xiao-pai.description: Works at the inn with her mother, Lin Fa. Mature, but has difficulty showing it due to her tendency to make clumsy mistakes. Feels lonely quite easily.

battle.description: Her attacks have a 2.98% chance to Crit.

char-arthur.name: Arthur
char-arthur.description: A prince of Norad. Kind and calm, but sometimes a little overly-predictable. Has unique tastes, and his reports are often so thoroughly accurate that he has been mistaken for a fortune-teller.

battle.description: His attacks have a 2.98% chance to Crit.

char-dylas.name: Dylas
char-dylas.description: Transformed from a horse monster and now works as a server at Porcoline's restaurant. Quiet and often misunderstood. Doesn't seem to get along well with Doug.

battle.description: His attacks have a 4.98% chance to Crit. His resistances are 14.99% Diz, 4.98% Crit.

char-kiel.name: Kiel
char-kiel.description: Always has his nose in a book. Very gullible and prone to gossip, but even when he's been tricked he's all smiles. Loves his sister, Forte, and often entrusts her with secrets. Well, at least he tries. Everyone else knows the same secret by the end of the day.

battle.description: His attacks have a 2.98% chance to Crit.

char-leon.name: Leon
char-leon.description: A man once sealed in Leon Karnak. Easygoing and loves messing with people, but works hard and secretly helps them out however he can. Has a charismatic aura that causes others to naturally look up to him.

battle.description: His attacks have a 2.98% chance to Crit. His resistances are 20% Diz, 4.98% Crit.

char-vishnal.name: Vishnal
char-vishnal.description: A butler in the castle who has amassed quite an array of knowledge on farming. Trains hard every day to be a full-fledged butler, but his gullible and emotional nature sometimes gets in the way. The oldest son, with many brothers and sisters.

battle.description: His attacks have a 2.98% chance to Crit.

char-bado.name: Bado
char-bado.description: A lazy, lazy blacksmith. Always tries to get rich quick, but always fails hard. He claims to enjoy the attempt, however. Despite all this his skills are second to none.

battle.description: His attacks have a 4.98% chance to Crit. His resistances are 4.98% Diz, 9.99% Crit.

char-blossom.name: Blossom
char-blossom.description: A sickly old lady who runs the local general store. Mostly stays home except when going to the doctor. Sees Doug as a son, and her health has improved drastically since living with him.

char-illuminata.name: Illuminata
char-illuminata.description: A detective who's always looking for new cases. It's unknown whether she manages to solve any, though. Enjoys afternoon tea -- it looks very detective-y and dignified to sip afternoon tea, right?

battle.description: Her attacks have a 2.98% chance to Crit. Her resistances are 4.98% Diz.

char-jones.name: Jones
char-jones.description: The only doctor in town. Tries to save as many people as possible, but hates blood and goes crazy when he sees it. Tries to drink tomato juice every day to overcome his crippling phobia. Married to Nancy.

battle.description: His attacks have a 2.98% chance to Crit.

char-lin-fa.name: Lin Fa
char-lin-fa.description: Xiao Pai's mother. Tender and easygoing. Often makes terrible mistakes, but it always works out in the end as fortune smiles upon her.

battle.description: Her attacks have a 14.99% chance to Crit. Her resistances are 14.99% to Crit.
skills: Multi Surprise Bucket (LV100+) - four buckets in a row.

char-nancy.name: Nancy
char-nancy.description: Wife of Dr. Jones and nurse at the local clinic. Loves her husband immensely and always strives to be the best wife she can be for him. Sweet, kind and always considerate of patients' feelings.

battle.description: Her attacks have Diz 2 and 7.98% chance to Crit. Her resistances are 4.98% Diz, 20% Crit.

char-porcoline.name: Porcoline
char-porcoline.description: A chef who owns the local eatery. A merciful weirdo helping anyone in need, who thinks of Margaret as if she were his own daughter. If he offers to cook you a meal, watch him, or else he might scarf it down himself before you can even get a bite.

battle.description: His attacks have a 1.98% chance to Crit. Skills : *Eat Food *Rail Strike *Twin Attack

char-ventuswill.name: Ventuswill
char-ventuswill.description: A legendary wind dragon who happens to be one of the four Native Dragons. Being the protector of Selphia has created a natural distance between her and her citizens, so she often experiences feelings of loneliness.

battle.description: ===Ally=== Her attacks Stun for 25% longer and have a 4.98% chance to Crit. She has 100% Dizzy and Knock resistance, 99% to Crits, and doesn't flinch when hit. She also the following elemental resistances:

char-volkanon.name: Volkanon
char-volkanon.description: Familiar with farming and battles, but a bit wordy. Charismatic, imaginative and emotional, so he's often seen in tears. Manly tears.

battle.description: His attacks have 2 Diz, Stun for 25% longer, and have a 9.99% chance to Crit. He has 9.99% resistance to Diz and Crits, and he doesn't flinch when hit.
favorite =✖️
